<?php namespace PayPalHttp; class HttpException extends IOException { /** * @var int */ public $statusCode; /** * @var array */ public $headers; /** * @param string $message * @param int $statusCode * @param array $headers */ public function __construct($message, $statusCode, $headers) { parent::__construct($message); $this->statusCode = $statusCode; $this->headers = $headers; } }
